title: Enable Or Disable Feature Gates — Identify which components need the feature gate
text:
Different feature gates affect different Kubernetes components:
Some features require enabling the gate on
multiple components
(e.g., API server and controller manager)
Other features only need the gate on a
single component
(e.g., only kubelet)
The
Feature Gates reference
typically indicates which components are affected by each gate. All Kubernetes components
share the same feature gate definitions, so all gates appear in help output, but only
relevant gates affect each component's behavior.
